description: Parqet is a portfolio tracking platform for private investors and professionals that aggregates holdings from brokers, banks, and multiple asset classes into one view. It provides performance, dividend, allocation, and tax analytics across web and mobile apps.
summary: Parqet exposes a REST-style Connect API and a remote MCP server; both use OAuth 2.0 via Parqet Connect, and no public GraphQL API or standalone CLI was found.
